text:
50 PRs merged this week. The React SDK and UI packages are officially live, meaning you can stop writing boilerplate and start building. Polly also learned how to draw explicit AI-driven tables and charts via render_visual.

We normalized pricing to at-cost, fixed some audio headers that were acting up, and watched 25 new community apps bloom in the ecosystem. 

Check the repo for the full changelog, or just hit the playground. 🐝✨

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #reactjs #buildinpublic #webdev
